Now the parietal pleura is exquisitely pain sensitive.
So if you put tubes or any other intervention into the thoracic cavity and by necessity when you go through the parietal pleura, that's a very painful procedure.
If you could go directly to the visceral pleura, then it's pain insensitive and you don't feel anything.
